content.markdown:
# macOS Local AI Detection Dashboard
This workbook provides a point-in-time security snapshot of macOS endpoints running local AI tools (e.g., Ollama, OpenClaw). Use the filters above to adjust the time window or focus on specific devices/accounts.

**Overview:** Key metrics across detection categories are shown below, followed by detailed results for each category.

## AI Tool Inventory (Last 30 Days)
List of macOS devices that have run local AI tool processes in the past 30 days, with first/last seen times, execution counts, and distinct user counts.

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d) and DeviceId in (DeviceInfo | where OSPlatform == 'macOS' | distinct DeviceId)
| where FileName in~ ('ollama','openclaw','ollama_llama_server','ollama-runner','mcp-server','codex','codex-cli','claude-code','npx','node','deno') or ProcessCommandLine has_any ('ollama','openclaw','ollama_llama_server','ollama-runner','mcp-server','codex','codex-cli','claude-code','npx','node','deno')
| summarize FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated), ExecutionCount=count(), DistinctUsers=dcount(AccountName) by DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath
| sort by LastSeen desc

content.markdown:
## First-Time AI Tool Usage (Last 24h)
New macOS AI tool processes seen in the last day that had no executions in the prior 30 days (potential new installations or reactivations).

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) and DeviceId in (DeviceInfo | where OSPlatform == 'macOS' | distinct DeviceId)
| where FileName in~ ('ollama', 'openclaw') or ProcessCommandLine has_any ('ollama', 'openclaw', 'openclaw.mjs')
| join kind=leftanti (
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1d)) and DeviceId in (DeviceInfo | where OSPlatform == 'macOS' | distinct DeviceId)
    | where FileName in~ ('ollama', 'openclaw') or ProcessCommandLine has_any ('ollama', 'openclaw', 'openclaw.mjs')
    | distinct DeviceId, FileName, ProcessCommandLine
) on DeviceId, FileName, ProcessCommandLine
| summarize FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated), ExecCount=count() by DeviceName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, AccountName
| sort by LastSeen desc

content.markdown:
## Local AI Server Listeners
Identifies macOS devices hosting local AI server instances (e.g., port 11434 for the Ollama API, 18789 for OpenClaw).

content.query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) and DeviceId in (DeviceInfo | where OSPlatform == 'macOS' | distinct DeviceId)
| where ActionType startswith 'Listening' and LocalPort in (11434, 18789)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, LocalIP, Port=LocalPort, ProcessName=InitiatingProcessFileName, CommandLine=InitiatingProcessCommandLine, User=InitiatingProcessAccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

content.markdown:
## AI Skill/Context File Activity (7 Days)
File creation or modification of key AI skill or context files on macOS (e.g., skill.md, soul.md) in the last 7 days.

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) and DeviceId in (DeviceInfo | where OSPlatform == 'macOS' | distinct DeviceId)
| where ActionType in ('FileCreated', 'FileModified')
| where tolower(FileName) in ('skill.md', 'skills.md', 'soul.md', 'memory.md', 'agents.md')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, ActionType
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

content.markdown:
### Suspicious Skill File Downloads (Last 24h)
Newly created AI skill files in the last 24 hours via command-line tools or external downloads (potential malicious implant).

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) and DeviceId in (DeviceInfo | where OSPlatform == 'macOS' | distinct DeviceId)
| where ActionType == 'FileCreated'
| where tolower(FileName) in ('skill.md', 'skills.md', 'soul.md')
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('curl','wget','python','python3','bash','sh','zsh','nscurl','scp') or isnotempty(FileOriginUrl)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, FileOriginUrl, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

content.markdown:
## AI Parent-Child Process Spawns
Instances where an AI-related process spawned a sensitive child process (shells, scripts, or network tools) on macOS in the last 30 days.

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d) and DeviceId in (DeviceInfo | where OSPlatform == 'macOS' | distinct DeviceId)
| where tolower(InitiatingProcessFileName) in ('ollama','openclaw','node','npx','deno') or InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any ('ollama','openclaw','openclaw.mjs')
| where FileName in~ ('sh','bash','zsh','python','python3','curl','wget','scp','osascript','launchctl','security','dscl')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, ParentProcess=InitiatingProcessFileName, ParentCmdLine=InitiatingProcessCommandLine, ChildProcess=FileName, ChildCmdLine=ProcessCommandLine, User=AccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

content.markdown:
## External Connections from AI Processes
Outbound network connections initiated by local AI processes on macOS (last 30 days), excluding known AI service domains.

content.query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d) and DeviceId in (DeviceInfo | where OSPlatform == 'macOS' | distinct DeviceId)
| where ActionType in ('ConnectionSuccess', 'ConnectionAttempt')
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('ollama','openclaw','node','npx','deno') or InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any ('ollama','openclaw')
| where RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| where RemoteUrl !has 'ollama' and RemoteUrl !has 'openclaw' and RemoteUrl !has 'anthropic.com' and RemoteUrl !has 'openai.com'
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, RemoteIP, RemoteUrl, RemotePort, ProcessName=InitiatingProcessFileName, CommandLine=InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

content.markdown:
## OpenClaw LaunchAgent Persistence (Last 24h)
Detects creation or modification of LaunchAgent plist files containing 'openclaw' in their name in the last 24 hours (possible OpenClaw persistence).

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) and DeviceId in (DeviceInfo | where OSPlatform == 'macOS' | distinct DeviceId)
| where ActionType in ('FileCreated', 'FileModified')
| where FolderPath has 'LaunchAgents' and FileName endswith '.plist'
| where FileName contains 'openclaw' or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('openclaw', 'node') or InitiatingProcessCommandLine has 'openclaw'
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, User=InitiatingProcessAccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
